# Acknowledgment — docx-templates

The DOCX fixtures in this directory are borrowed from
[guigrpa/docx-templates](https://github.com/guigrpa/docx-templates)'s own
test corpus, used here as inputs that exercise our OOXML validator against
real-world Word/Office 365 templates.

- Upstream repo: <https://github.com/guigrpa/docx-templates>
- Upstream source path: `src/__tests__/fixtures/`
- License: MIT — see the upstream
  [LICENSE](https://github.com/guigrpa/docx-templates/blob/master/LICENSE)

Thanks to Guillermo Grau Panea and the docx-templates contributors for
keeping their fixtures public.

For per-file provenance, see `README.md` in this directory and
`tests/fixtures/external/README.md`.
